steps.title: Spot the 'which' relative clause
steps.content: After the blank comes “which was created in 1910...” — the relative pronoun “which” introduces a relative clause.

steps.title: Apply the 'which' comma rule
steps.content: A relative clause introduced by “which” must be preceded by a comma. Choice A correctly places the comma before the clause. The other choices either omit the comma, place it incorrectly, or create fragments. That matches choice A — A is correct.
